title: Net declarations using built-in types should be limited to 4-state data types

features.name: net declaration with 2-state bit type and unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a net declaration (wire/tri/etc.) using the 2-state bit type with an unpacked array dimension, which is illegal per IEEE 1800-2017 section 6.7.1

features.name: net declaration with 2-state real type
features.description: Code should include a net declaration (wire/tri/etc.) using the 2-state real type, which is illegal per IEEE 1800-2017 section 6.7.1

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
